title: SVExtractTestCode is not determinstic
body:
The portlist generated by modules produced by SVExtractTestCode isn't deterministic - it is depending iterations through hashtable order.  I get diffs like this in some testcases which should be identical:

```
@@ -3110,50 +3110,53 @@
 module TileLinkMonitor_assert( 
-  input         _source_ok_WIRE_1_7, reset,
-  input [31:0]  io_in_a_bits_address, io_in_a_bits_mask,
-  input [3:0]   io_in_d_bits_size,
-  input         io_in_d_bits_corrupt, _source_ok_WIRE_8, io_in_d_ready, io_in_d_valid,
+  input [2:0]   io_in_d_bits_opcode,
+  input         reset, prev_reset_3, io_in_d_valid, prev_valid_reg_3,
+  input         io_in_d_bits_corrupt,
+  input [31:0]  io_in_a_bits_mask,
   input [1:0]   io_in_d_bits_param,
-  input         _source_ok_WIRE_7, _source_ok_WIRE_1_8, _source_ok_WIRE_5, io_in_a_valid,
   input [2:0]   io_in_a_bits_param,
```

I'm not sure the full extend of the problem, but at least `dataflowSlice` and `blockSlice` are iterating over smallptrsets.  These should use something like SetVector.

CC @darthscsi and @youngar
